feed.title: Calico Calico!
feed.subtitle: This is my corner of the internet

entry.title: Fuck GoDaddy, fuck NameCheap
entry.content:
GoDaddy and NameCheap are what we call “Domain Registrars”. Whenever you want to purchase a domain, you to go a Domain Registrar, and you buy one, and they will supposedly deal with most of the bullshit for you.

At about the same time that I decided I would start working on this website, I came up with a project that consisted in
entry.summary: GoDaddy and NameCheap are what we call “Domain Registrars”. Whenever you want to purchase a domain, you to go a Domain Registrar, and you buy one, and they will supposedly deal with most of the bullshit for you.
